title: haybale-ported
description: Porting the Haybale library written by CommodoreThrawn as part porting StrawGolems.
body:
This is an unofficial ported version of the Haybale library originally made my CommodoreThrawn. This is a library mod used in his projects, such as Straw Golem Rebaled. This library is being ported to allow for easier ports of their mods. If CommodoreThrawn would like to use this port officially or wants this port taken down, feel free to message me and I will do so.


Features:

- Made for mods with multiloader

- Annotation system for entity, item, particle, and sound registration

- Packet system and entity capability system

- Some platform sided services like a server scheduler and such
